Witness Name: Ruth Reid

Exhibits: [ ]

Dated: 12 January 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

SECOND WITNESS STATEMENT OF RUTH REID

1. I, Ruth Reid, will say as follows:

2. In recognition of the importance of the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry, I continue to offer my full co-operation to the Inquiry.
